17 RSCHGTS RES_CHG_TIMESTAMP Resident Data Update Timestamp DATE 8 The late updated date and time of resident data.
18 RSMTCHCR RES_MATCH_CRITERIA Resident Match Criteria CHAR 2 This field is used in determining if a record should be written to the resident history table. It is a number showing which of the resident matching criteria was positive for a match, and is zero if it is a new resident.
19 SBASTIID SB_ASMT_INT_ID
